_purpose: Example call to amplify_audit_freshness — surfaces memory/<date>.md files newer than the latest Amplifier write for a project. Use when you suspect a previous session did real work but forgot to record it as lessons/decisions.

_alternate_input_with_project_path._note: When you pass project_path instead of project, the final directory name becomes the project name and memory_dir defaults to <project_path>/memory.

_typical_output_shape:
Stale memory files for project "my-api":
  Memory dir: /Users/me/.claude/memory
  Latest Amplifier write: 2026-05-25 23:56:29
  Stale count: 1

Files (oldest first):
  • 2026-05-26.md — 3.2 KB — mtime 2026-05-26T16:42:18.000Z

Next step: open each file, decide what's worth keeping, and call amplify_learn / amplify_decisions retroactively.
_when_to_use: Run after a long idle gap, when amplify_context_load shows the ⚠ Stale memory files block, or when you want to confirm that a recent session's lessons were actually recorded (and not just claimed).
